title: Managing your SonarQube Cloud project as a developer | Documentation
content:
# Managing your project as a developer

## [Connecting your project to SonarQube for IDE](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/managing-your-project-as-developer/#connecting-to-sonarlint "Connecting your project to SonarQube for IDE")

[SonarQube for IDE](https://www.sonarsource.com/products/sonarlint/ "SonarQube for IDE") is a free IDE extension that integrates with SonarQube Cloud using [Connected Mode](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/improving/connected-mode/ "Connected Mode"). This way, SonarQube for IDE can catch issues immediately, right in the IDE, before you even commit them.

Check the SonarQube for IDE documentation for the details about setting up Connected Mode:

- [IntelliJ Connected Mode](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/intellij/team-features/connected-mode/ "IntelliJ Connected Mode")
- [Visual Studio Connected Mode](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/visual-studio/team-features/connected-mode/ "Visual Studio Connected Mode")
- [VS Code Connected Mode](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/vs-code/team-features/connected-mode/ "VS Code Connected Mode")
- [Eclipse Connected Mode](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-for-ide/eclipse/team-features/connected-mode/ "Eclipse Connected Mode")

## [Generating a token for your project analysis](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/managing-your-project-as-developer/#generating-token "Generating a token for your project analysis")

See [Managing your tokens](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-account/managing-tokens/ "Managing your tokens").

## [Subscribing to notifications on project events](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/managing-your-project-as-developer/#subscribing-to-notifications "Subscribing to notifications on project events")

You can choose to receive email notifications when specific events occur in your project. See [Subscribing to email notifications](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-account/notifications/ "Subscribing to email notifications").

## [Marking a project as favorite](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/managing-your-project-as-developer/#mark-as-favorite "Marking a project as favorite")

Favorite projects are displayed on **Your projects** page.

When you create a project, it's automatically marked as favorite.

To mark a project as a favorite:

1. [Retrieve the project](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/retrieving-projects/ "Retrieve the project").

2. In the top of the left-side panel, select the star.

![](https://docs.sonarsource.com/Base64-Image-Removed)

![](https://assets-eu-01.kc-usercontent.com:443/b1eeb429-d9e0-0100-be87-468f6802040a/bd518bfa-2f54-40e9-a036-b58820b30d26/sonarqube-cloud-mark-project-as-favorite_Cs0024.png?w=917&h=572&auto=format&fit=crop)

Alternatively, you can select or unselect the star in a list of projects as illustrated below.

![](https://docs.sonarsource.com/Base64-Image-Removed)

![](https://assets-eu-01.kc-usercontent.com:443/b1eeb429-d9e0-0100-be87-468f6802040a/d34a6a40-7aeb-4771-b30b-b6e0950fa26c/sonarqube-cloud-mark-project-as-favorite_Cs0023.png?w=1558&h=1033&auto=format&fit=crop)

## [Using a project badge](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/managing-your-project-as-developer/#using-project-badge "Using a project badge")

If you have project access, you can include dynamic SonarQube Cloud badges on your web pages to display information about the project such as:

- The current value of specific metrics
- The current quality gate status
- The fact that you are using SonarQube Cloud
- That your [AI code](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/ai-capabilities/ai-code-assurance/ "AI code") has been analyzed (for Team and Enterprise plans)

Markdown snippets and simple image URLs are provided to generate the badge code.

To generate the code of your dynamic project badge:

1. [Retrieve the project](https://docs.sonarsource.com/sonarqube-cloud/managing-your-projects/retrieving-projects/ "Retrieve the project").

2. In the left navigation bar, select **Information**.

3. In the **Badges** section:

  1. Select the information type you want to display: 

    - Metric value
    - Quality gate status
    - SonarQube Cloud user
  2. If you selected the metric value information type, select the metric in **Customize badge**.
  3. In Code format, select **Markdown** (markdown snippet) or **Image URL** depending on how you want to include your badge.
  4. Select the **Copy** button to copy the code of your badge.

![](https://docs.sonarsource.com/Base64-Image-Removed)

![](https://assets-eu-01.kc-usercontent.com:443/b1eeb429-d9e0-0100-be87-468f6802040a/0fc5ab47-91ee-4f8e-b922-c413676e5110/sonarqube-cloud-project-badge_Cs0008.png?w=727&h=595&auto=format&fit=crop)
